name: Image Optimizer
description: Automatically resize, compress, and strip metadata from uploaded images.
author: NodePress

settings.label: Max width (px)
settings.description: Downscale wider images to this width.

settings.label: Max height (px)
settings.description: Downscale taller images to this height.

settings.label: Convert to WebP
settings.description: Save optimized uploads as WebP for smaller file sizes.

settings.label: Strip EXIF metadata
settings.description: Remove camera and location metadata from images.
